name: erp-report-builder
description: Parameterised ERP Report Builder — BIRT analogue using Node.js, SQL-like query engine, and formatted HTML/PDF output. Portfolio project demonstrating familiarity with report tooling principles (EFACS/BIRT), complex SQL (CTEs, aggregations, joins), and JavaScript scripting in reporting contexts.
author: Nivedita Saha <contact@nivsaha.com> (https://nivsaha.com)
